overall.description: Cinematic game engine footage depicting a rainy cyberpunk city street at night, featuring neon-lit skyscrapers, wet reflective asphalt, and atmospheric volumetric lighting. The camera moves slowly along the sidewalk past parked vehicles and illuminated storefronts, showcasing high-fidelity rain and lighting effects characteristic of modern AAA game engines.

skyscraper with blue-tinted glass facade and glowing windows

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a rain-soaked cyberpunk street at night, with a black luxury sedan parked on the right. Neon signs illuminate the towering skyscrapers in the background, casting red and blue reflections on the wet asphalt. The camera moves slowly forward along the sidewalk as a pedestrian crosses the intersection ahead, while the traffic light remains red.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk downtown intersection with prominent blue glass architecture

events.description: camera slows slightly as it approaches the corner of the intersection

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk past the parked car, approaching the intersection corner

entered.detail: large rectangular concrete block sitting in the middle of the wet street

segments.scene_description: As the camera continues moving forward, the blue glass tower on the left becomes more prominent while the street vendor stall passes out of view behind. The parked sedan recedes into the distance on the right. The wet intersection remains central, with a concrete barrier now visible in the street. The rain continues to fall steadily, maintaining the atmospheric neon reflections on the ground.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward glide through a rain-soaked cyberpunk street that shifts focus from a parked luxury vehicle toward the towering architecture of a neon-lit district. It begins on a wet sidewalk beside a black luxury sedan, moving past a pedestrian crossing an intersection under the red glow of a traffic light and the reflections of towering skyscrapers. As the camera advances, the parked sedan and a nearby street vendor stall recede into the distance, allowing the scene to open up. The perspective then shifts to emphasize a prominent blue glass tower on the left while a concrete barrier emerges within the rain-slicked intersection. Finally, the camera continues its steady progression through the downpour, maintaining a constant trail of vivid red and blue neon reflections across the asphalt.
